decision_summary: Adopt Rows149-220 and their durable external controller, pass-level routing, decoded bridge, specialist-pass, MaskFactory adapter, evidence, QA, and bounded App Mode contracts without claiming implementation or runtime completion.
adopted_decisions: The external durable controller owns orchestration state, recovery, evidence aggregation, and deterministic policy; ComfyUI remains an execution plane.
Every pass resolves an exact eligible engine, model bundle, workflow release, and runtime stack before ranking or execution.
Cross-engine transfer uses decoded artifacts and explicit transforms; cross-family latent transfer is forbidden without an exact compatibility certificate.
Specialist passes preserve the accepted parent and require target, protected-region, boundary, ownership, and whole-artifact QA before promotion.
MaskFactory Mode A is read-only package access whose authority depends on truth tier and certificate; Mode B output remains draft-only unless an exact scoped certificate grants more.
Main never writes MaskFactory gold packages or relabels a prediction or refinement draft as gold.
App Mode is a bounded operator surface over the controller and does not become durable reasoning, state, or promotion authority.
Rows149-220 are additive and do not change the accepted completion truth of Rows001-148.

worker_review.requested_lane: Claude Sonnet 5 through AI worker dispatcher
worker_review.issue: The preservation package is intentionally untracked, and dispatcher policy accepts only tracked scope.

next_action: Integrate Rows149-220 before dependent Rows221-320 in one protected planning-only checkpoint, then implement a synthetic controller and schema slice without activating model-dependent runtime work.
